message:
Improve wrap package test coverage (72.0% → 77.1%)

Add tests for:
- Run with context cancellation
- recordSession with nil DB
- recordSession with empty ProfilesUsed
- recordSession with retry count > 0
- runOnce with unknown provider
- teeWriter Flush with empty buffer
- teeWriter with multiple complete lines
- Run with vault list error
- DefaultConfig all field values
- NextDelay with negative multiplier

Improved function coverage:
- runOnce: 76.3% → 84.2%
- recordSession: 75.0% → 91.7%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
